title: Personal Finance & Investment Clarity Hub — Notion Template
description:
Stop juggling five different apps just to understand your own finances. The Personal Finance & Investment Clarity Hub is an all-in-one Notion template that brings your investment portfolio, budget, dividends, net worth, and financial goals into a single, beautifully organized workspace.

Built for intermediate Notion users — no complex formula-building required. Everything is pre-configured so you can start tracking on day one.

Track every stock, ETF, crypto, and alternative asset with automatic ROI and unrealized gain calculations. Log every dividend and distribution so you never lose sight of your passive income progress. Monitor monthly income vs. expenses with a clear budget dashboard. Set financial goals with visual progress bars and built-in timelines. Capture monthly net worth snapshots to watch your wealth grow over time.

Whether you're building toward financial independence, chasing a $2,000/month dividend stream, or simply trying to know where your money goes each month — this template gives you the clarity and control you've been missing. Perfect for investors, savers, and anyone serious about their financial future.
